detect.threshold: >=1 static match, or anomalous process/exec at runtime
detect.action: open ticket; page on runtime signal

respond: isolate the affected host/process (containment before cleanup)
replace the dangerous construct (parameterize SQL, drop shell=True, avoid pickle on untrusted input)
audit for lateral movement if the path was reachable and exercised

harden.change: eliminate the dynamic-exec / string-built query; use safe APIs
add a CI lint rule that fails the build on this pattern

recover: confirm the construct is gone and tests cover the safe path
re-scan; confirm zero matches for the rule
